positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of a majestic owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by floating constellations and celestial runes. Deep indigo and gold color palette, elegant symmetry, Art Nouveau influence, highly decorative, ink and gold leaf effect.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy, amateur drawing, childish, messy lines
